# Transcrição: 06-Cold Targeting - Hack 2- Newsfeed

## [00:00 - 01:20]

Okay, so I talked you through using audience insights as well as looking at some of the pages. Another hack that you have, another option that you have here, is to actually just go in the news feed and if you are part of that target audience, so if you are someone that's already in that audience that you're trying to target, something that you can do is actually check out some of the targeting that ads are using in the actual news feed. Now Facebook's not going to show everything, but it will show you some. So we've got an ad here from BMW New Zealand and they're announcing a new car or something. What I'm going to do is click on this little button on the right hand top right hand corner. I'm going to go, why am I seeing this? And essentially it's going to reveal to me one part of their targeting and so here they've they've targeted people with an interest in luxury goods. Now people ages 40 and older who live in New Zealand. I don't know why I'm in this audience actually. So, but anyways, this is giving you some of this targeting that BMW New Zealand are using. So this is another quick and easy hack that you can use if you yourself are part of the audience that you're trying to target.
